name: Yu-Jo Friendship
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>友</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ゆう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>情</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby> ＹＵ－ＪＹＯ
desc: Offer your opponent a handshake. If they accept your handshake, each player's Life Points become half the combined Life Points of both players. If you have "Unity" in your hand and show it to your opponent, they must accept the handshake.
eff: Offer your opponent a handshake. If they accept your handshake, each player's Life Points become half the combined Life Points of both players. If you have "Unity" in your hand and show it to your opponent, they must accept the handshake.
